subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He unto Whom belongeth whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is in the earth, and all are His worshippers, and unto Him belongeth that which He hath created and createth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی له ما فی السموات و ما فی الارض و کل له عابدون و له ما خلق و یخلق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @station of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
